name: @sidecoin/desktop
description: Sidecoin — Desktop wallet for the eCash Bitcoin hard fork with BIP-300/301 Drivechain support.

scripts.build: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); if (!fs.existsSync('dist')) fs.mkdirSync('dist')" && pnpm type:gen && vue-tsc --noEmit && vite build
scripts.check: pnpm type:gen && pnpm test:rust && vue-tsc --noEmit && pnpm test
scripts.coverage:merge: pnpm coverage:clean && pnpm coverage:rust && pnpm coverage:frontend
scripts.test:rust: cd src-tauri && cargo fmt --check && cargo llvm-cov --ignore-filename-regex '(main|export_types|lib)\.rs$'
scripts.type:gen: cd src-tauri && cargo run --bin export_types && cd ../ && node -e "const path = require('path'); const fs = require('fs'); const cwd = process.cwd(); const f = path.join(cwd, 'src', 'bindings.ts'); if (!fs.existsSync(f)) { console.error('Generated types file not found at ' + f + '. Ensure cargo run succeeded.'); process.exit(1); } const content = fs.readFileSync(f, 'utf8'); fs.writeFileSync(f, '//@ts-nocheck\n' + content); console.log('Types augmented with @ts-nocheck at ' + f);"
